description: The only ht-ml.app tool that remembers what you published, a local registry of every site, its once-only update_key, and full version history, plus one-command publish-with-assets.

novel_features.name: Site registry inventory
novel_features.description: See every site you've ever published, with health flags for orphaned sites and broken assets.

novel_features.name: Key vault & recovery
novel_features.description: Reveal a single write key, or export/import a passphrase-sealed vault of all your update_keys for disaster recovery and a second machine.

novel_features.name: One-shot asset reconcile
novel_features.description: Parse a site's HTML, find every referenced-but-missing image or video, and upload them all in one pass.

novel_features.name: Broken-asset audit
novel_features.description: Across all your sites, list the ones with publicly-visible broken or missing images.

novel_features.name: Version rollback
novel_features.description: Revert a live site to any prior HTML version stored locally, with the update_key resolved for you.

novel_features.name: Living-doc republish by alias
novel_features.description: Publish a recurring document under a stable local alias: update in place if the alias exists, or create it once and bind it.

novel_features.name: Pre-publish secret/PII scan
novel_features.description: Mechanically scan HTML for leaked secrets and PII before it becomes a public, permanent URL.
